title: What's New
lead: The current version of Cachly is 8.1.6, released February 17, 2026. Here’s what recent releases added, and what’s coming next in Cachly 8.2 and 8.3.

sections.heading: Coming soon
sections.text: Two releases are in active development: Cachly 8.2 — Cachly Intelligence (AI summaries of logs and descriptions, an AI log assistant, and CarPlay voice summaries) and Multi-User Logging (log a find under several geocaching.com accounts at once). Both are Cachly Pro features. Cachly 8.3 — Track Recording & HealthKit integration.

sections.heading: Cachly 8.1.6 February 17, 2026
sections.text: A maintenance release with bug fixes: Fixed an issue where some cache images were missing their image names. Restored cache titles in Compass view when viewing live caches. Fixed an issue where trackable images were black and not sending. Fixed an iPad layout issue where the Add Photo button and text counter made the log text area appear too small.

sections.heading: Cachly 8.1 — CarPlay
sections.text: Cachly 8.1 brought full CarPlay support to Cachly Pro: the complete map (including Pro Offline Maps) on your car’s dashboard, cache lists, navigation to caches, and voice-activated logging with speech-to-text. Read the full announcement: Cachly 8.1 with CarPlay and the follow-up CarPlay update .

sections.heading: Cachly 8.0 — Cachly Pro
sections.text: Cachly 8.0 introduced Cachly Pro , the optional subscription with worldwide offline vector maps (contours, hillshade, trails, POI, 3D buildings), live cache loading, county and region tracking, the DeLorme Grid, and OSM POI search. Read the full announcement: Cachly 8.0 .

sections.heading: Full version history
sections.text: The official App Store release notes for every version of Cachly — all 140 releases, from the current version back to Cachly 1.0.1 in December 2015. Cachly 8.1.6 February 16, 2026 Bug Fixes Fixed an issue where some cache images were missing their image names. Restored cache titles in Compass view when viewing live caches. Fixed an issue where trackable images were black and not sending. Fixed a layout issue on iPad where the Add Photo button and text counter were positioned incorrectly, causing the log text area to appear too small. Cachly 8.1.5 February 12, 2026 Fixed an issue with CarPlay's map not showing full screen. Cachly 8.1.4 February 6, 2026 Bug fixes State restoration not restoring correctly when returning to Cachly CarPlay zoom level not being respected then tapping current location button Photos bar getting hidden under keyboard when adding images to a log Cachly 8.1.3 February 2, 2026 Bug Fixes & Improvements Fixed an issue where the Watch app compass could freeze after the screen turned off. Resolved a display issue with log text and personal notes when using a hardware keyboard. Restored the Add (+) button in Offline Lists on smaller devices or when using larger text sizes. Fixed an issue preventing state restoration dates from being cleared. Improved GPX importing to ensure all valid files import correctly. Resolved several CarPlay interface issues, including: Fixed an issue where navigating using Apple Maps was giving a "Directions Not Available" error Fixed an issue where map light or dark mode would not persist after being selected. Fixed an issue where some Cachly Pro users would repeatedly see the Pro upgrade warning when starting their car. Favorite count being covered by icons Corrected custom cache sort order not displaying properly. Owned but unpublished caches not appearing greyed out like iOS Saved zoom level not being restored when returning to CarPlay Cachly 8.1.2 January 14, 2026 Features New CarPlay map settings (north-up view, light/dark/auto modes, compass toggle) Bug Fixes Major memory and stability improvements Fixed multiple CarPlay UI and map issues Resolved crashes related to offline maps, pins, and Adventure Lab stages Fixed Google Maps centering incorrectly when switching map types Cachly 8.1.1 January 6, 2026 Fixes in 8.1.1: Improvements & Fixes Improved overall memory management for better stability and performance Fixed an issue where updating offline lists with Google Maps could cause the app to crash CarPlay now displays a helpful map alert on first launch if a required map is missing 8.1.1 New & Updated Features Added a CarPlay option when creating or editing offline lists Introduced TomTom GO as a new navigation provider for CarPlay Fixed an issue where event icons were not displaying correctly in CarPlay, ensuring proper icon support across iOS New CarPlay Support in 8.1: Cachly now includes full CarPlay integration, bringing geocaching to your vehicle's dashboard. Map & Navigation View nearby geocaches on an interactive map while driving Navigate to caches using Pro Offline Maps, Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze Create multi-cache routes by selecting multiple geocaches Two-finger zoom and rotation on supported displays Cache name labels appear at higher zoom levels Proximity alerts notify you when approaching a geocache Navigation automatically resumes when reconnecting to CarPlay Voice Logging Log geocaches hands-free using voice recognition Supports Found It, DNF, Write Note, Attended, Will Attend, and Webcam Photo Taken Option to skip voice input and use templates only Review your log message with text-to-speech playback Respects your iOS app log templates and draft settings Trips Integration Browse offline lists (Trips) directly in CarPlay View up to 1,000 caches per Trip Custom sorting or sort by distance Show Trip caches on the map Settings & Customization Filter options: exclude finds, exclude hides, sync with iPhone filters Three pin style options Default zoom level remembers your preference Proximity alert filtering for favorited caches only --- New Features & Fixes Logs & Personal Notes Usernames in logs now create clickable links in markdown Coordinate Detection Improved coordinate detection for more formats and special characters Trackables View user profile of holder and owner in additional info Pro Offline Maps Land cover opacity now decreases as you zoom in for better detail visibility Option to toggle planet landcover and hill shades Updated styles with additional path and trail types Performance & Stability Major memory management improvements reducing high memory usage Fixed memory leaks causing crashes Fixed various state restoration crashes Fixed crashes when leaving app on certain screens Cachly 8.1 November 3, 2025 New CarPlay Support: Cachly now includes full CarPlay integration, bringing geocaching to your vehicle's dashboard. Map & Navigation View nearby geocaches on an interactive map while driving Navigate to caches using Pro Offline Maps, Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze Create multi-cache routes by selecting multiple geocaches Two-finger zoom and rotation on supported displays Cache name labels appear at higher zoom levels Proximity alerts notify you when approaching a geocache Navigation automatically resumes when reconnecting to CarPlay Voice Logging Log geocaches hands-free using voice recognition Supports Found It, DNF, Write Note, Attended, Will Attend, and Webcam Photo Taken Option to skip voice input and use templates only Review your log message with text-to-speech playback Respects your iOS app log templates and draft settings Trips Integration Browse offline lists (Trips) directly in CarPlay View up to 1,000 caches per Trip Custom sorting or sort by distance Show Trip caches on the map Settings & Customization Filter options: exclude finds, exclude hides, sync with iPhone filters Three pin style options Default zoom level remembers your preference Proximity alert filtering for favorited caches only --- New Features & Fixes Logs & Personal Notes Usernames in logs now create clickable links in markdown Coordinate Detection Improved coordinate detection for more formats and special characters Trackables View user profile of holder and owner in additional info Pro Offline Maps Land cover opacity now decreases as you zoom in for better detail visibility Option to toggle planet landcover and hill shades Updated styles with additional path and trail types Performance & Stability Major memory management improvements reducing high memory usage Fixed memory leaks causing crashes Fixed various state restoration crashes Fixed crashes when leaving app on certain screens Cachly 8.0.16 October 26, 2025 Fixed an issue where trackables were not being dropped correctly when a user thought they were. Cachly 8.0.15 October 15, 2025 Fixed an issue in Google Maps on iOS 26 where panning around the map would cause the screen to navigate to the previous screen. Cachly 8.0.14 October 10, 2025 This version fixes an issue with submitting trackable visit logs. The issue has now been fixed, but there are limitations to trackable visits in place by Geocaching HQ: 20 visit logs per 15 minutes 600 visit logs per 25 hours Please let us know if you have any questions, support@cach.ly Cachly 8.0.13 August 29, 2025 Fixed an issue with personal notes on iPad where the notes section was not full screen and the notes images buttons were not visible. Cachly 8.0.12 July 29, 2025 Bug fixes Fixed an issue where personal note was not saved consistently and there was user confusion around how and when it was saving. Cachly 8.0.11 July 2, 2025 Fixed an issue where the found it checkmark was not always showing in offline lists when a log was added to pending logs. If you have any issues please contact support@cach.ly Cachly 8.0.10 June 6, 2025 Bug Fixes Fixed an issue where caches were showing a found checkmark on pin and callout when they should not Cachly 8.0.9 June 1, 2025 Features Log Keywords: Added keyword for personal note Proximity Alert: Additional Sounds added Personal Note: Save note when leaving app and when exiting screen Bug Fixes Event time on details screen showed incorrectly Usernames with special characters will now work in filtering correctly Coordinate format picker should be turned off by default Online Drafts: Date/time keywords replacements not taking timezone into account Online Drafts: Time gets saved incorrectly when editing drafts Online Drafts: Incorrect draft count after the app got restored Online Drafts: If user has no drafts tableView header with 0 Drafts is shown Offline List: Creating waypoints and then refreshing cache duplicate the waypoint User Profile: Username text needs dark stoke to stand out GPX Import: Additional check for timezone format needed for missing event Coordinate detection: Correct special characters used to make an apostrophe (GCAKH58) Log photo dates need to match logged date Cache Details: Favorite and trackables boxes stay black after tapping in dark mode Cachly 8.0.8 December 5, 2024 Fixed an issue where the cache radius was shown incorrectly for found caches. Cachly 8.0.7 November 22, 2024 What's New Features Pro Offline Maps: Map labels should use localized text based on device language Watch App: Nearby now shows filter options at top of list Watch App: Nearby now shows refresh search at top of list Watch App: Filter options added a reset button Watch App: Filter for cache added toggle all option Watch App: Saved caches added a remove all option Logs: Opted out user logs add the option to view on geocaching.com Bug Fixes Pending Logs: DNF icon does not persist on map or list view Pending Logs: Change cache type should reflect the change on the map for found or DNF Map position not kept when switching maps Crash when editing an offline cache Export GPX: Cache type should not use a localized name Found and owned cache pins have incorrect offset on map 502 error thrown by the API when too many caches are requested along with full cache data 502 error thrown when using full cache data and viewing a user's finds Pin drag failing in Google Maps Create offline geocache by tapping current location not adding cache to the map instantly Tapping current location button sometimes stopped zooming to location Personal Note: Detected text font size it too small Regular Users: Personal notes should only be allowed in offline lists Regular Users: Don't allow loading logs unless full cache has been loaded DNFs not showing up consistently on the map Google Maps not showing map scale Offline List Filtering: Using multiple Or Date Found By Me filters doesn’t work If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Cachly 8.0.6 September 3, 2024 What's New Translation Updates: Slovak, Danish Bug Fixes Fixed: Submitting log as draft was not correctly sending the time zone Fixed: Pro Offline Maps: Some POI not always showing Fixed: Pro Offline Maps: Some labels missing larger accessibility text sizes Fixed: Pro Offline Maps: House number label should be lower priority than POI Fixed: Pro Offline Maps: Parking POI icon should be lower priority than other POI Fixed: Online Drafts: Template keywords not converted when sending log on list view Fixed: Logs: Great Story and Helpful were not showing correctly Fixed: State Restoration: Offline lists not always restoring the map at the correct position Fixed: Google Maps: Showing pins on the map should not do a short zoom animation If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Cachly 8.0.5 July 10, 2024 Fixed a timezone issue when logging caches in a timezone different from the cache If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Cachly 8.0.4 July 7, 2024 What's New Slovak language Proximity alert added to Live tab Proximity alert option to show hint in notification OsmAnd added to routing providers Long press on map layers has a new dialog menu Bug Fixes Fixed: Pending logs displayed date/time not using correct timezone Fixed: Toggling automatic search would show Pro dialog Fixed: DeLorme challenges with duplicate pages not crediting both pages Fixed: iPad bug when trying to download Wherigo cartridge Fixed: State restoration showing world view when returning to navigate to cache screen Fixed: State restoration navigate to cache not showing target cache or waypoints Fixed: Submitting draft using 12-hour time and some timezones giving error Fixed: Live search filters not working with usernames with special characters Fixed: Offline Maps POI on/off not always working Fixed: Counties, loading additional caches would crash Fixed: User profile image on More tab sometimes squished Fixed: Friends logs not showing favorited heart Fixed: Drafts keywords not being replaced when sent Fixed: Drafts sending with images not submitting images or dismissing screen Fixed: Using find caches near this option with auto load would crash Fixed: Counties in Nova Scotia not showing correctly (download new map required) If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. --------- Cachly 8.0 is one of our biggest release to date. It brings some great new features including Pro Offline Maps, Counties, Auto loading Map and much more. Updated interface design for modern iOS Cachly Pro Pro Offline Maps: Including new features Counties/Regions DeLorme Grid Auto loading map Online Drafts Download PQ .zip for faster imports Wherigo: Option to download New coordinate format picker Trackable logs: Keywords now available Improved place searching Option to append personal note on GPX import Proximity Alert: Additional sound options Apple Watch: Cachly available on infographic style Live Search Filtering: Set search radius Live Search Filtering: Provinces Mapy.cz support Much much more If you have questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 8.0.3 April 22, 2024 What's New Change: Users who previously purchased offline maps can now download and use pro maps without a subscription. Pro Offline Maps: Fixed an issue where some POIs were missing from maps Pro Offline Maps: Trail length labels are now hidden if trail is less than 500 meters long. This option is user changeable in Settings. Pro Offline Maps: Fixed an issue where some trails were not showing at high zoom levels. New maps are currently being generated with the change. Offline Lists: Fixed an issue where scrolling through a large number of lists was slow. DeLorme: Fixed WA Page 99 DeLorme: Fixed pages not being sorted correctly Norwegian localization missing some text Updated translations for Portuguese and Spanish If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. --------- Cachly 8.0 is one of our biggest release to date. It brings some great new features including Pro Offline Maps, Counties, Auto loading Map and much more. Auto Load: Fixed an issue when using one of the follow modes that moving the map would bring you back to your current location. Counties/Regions: Open Street Map and other custom tile layers now show correctly Counties/Regions: Jervis Bay in Australian Capital Territory added Apple Maps: Follow mode now working correctly Pro Offline Maps: Fixed Australia state abbreviations Pro Offline Maps: Fixed issue with POI icons/labels showing when they shouldn't Highlighting: Fixed a crash when you highlight a cache on another device Subscribe to Cachly Pro option added to More tab Spanish language translation Updated french translation --------- Cachly 8.0 is one of our biggest release to date. Cachly 7.1.3 October 25, 2023 Bug Fixes Geocaching API requirements update Fixed issue in iOS 17 where events could not be added to the iOS calendar Fixed an issue with the compass not showing circular lines Fixed various iOS 17 issues Other misc fixes Cachly 8.0 is still very much in development and we cannot wait for you to see what we have planned! If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps! Or if you have questions or comments please email support@cach.ly Cachly 7.1.1 May 10, 2022 Bug Fixes Fixed an issue with caches not showing in Live when using Premium Offline Maps. If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps! Or if you have questions or comments please email support@cach.ly Cachly 7.1 March 22, 2022 New in this version ## Adventure Labs: Stages shown on map ## All Adventure Lab stages can now be loaded for non-sequential labs and the first stage of sequential labs. ## Network Debugger ## New option in Help & Settings to share network debug data for help with debugging API issues. Bug Fixes Live Search: Usernames with + not correctly being encoded for the API Live: Tapping reload button too fast can cause large gaps in the loaded caches Open Street and other tile based maps should not show Apple Maps POIs Premium Offline Maps: Sorting of extras with special characters places them in the wrong spot (Germany Baden-Württemberg) Import GPX: Images in GPX not downloaded Other misc fixes If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps! Or if you have questions or comments please email support@cach.ly Cachly 7.0.12 February 16, 2022 This version of Cachly brings one big bug fix. Fixed an issue with tiled maps (OS Maps, Open Street, Open Cycle, custom URL) flashing continually when navigating to a cache. Questions? Email support@cach.ly Cachly 7.0.11 January 26, 2022 This version of Cachly brings multiple bug fixes for a better experience. They include: Current location red heading indicator not pointing correctly when device is in landscape Offline Images: Duplicate images are created in the database when loading more images Personal Note: Update not being made to API when note is removed Live Filtering Countries: Changed Czech Republic to Czechia Watch App: Offline Lists not sorting correctly, should be by distance to cache User Profile: Disclosure indicator doesn't alway show when it should Offline List: Long press delete option should have delete from all and remove from all options if in multiple lists Cachly 7.0.10 January 6, 2022 This release fixes the following issues Live filtering using the State or Country option could show invalid URL error. Searching for GC code of cache already on the map should now select that cache. List view show on map option wasn't working in Google Maps. Thanks for using Cachly! Cachly 7.0.9 December 31, 2021 This release fixes a bug with caches on the Live map failing to load on the first try, as well as other API requests. Please make sure to leave us a rating for Cachly if you appreciate using it! Cachly 7.0.8 December 27, 2021 This release fixes a few issues with geocaches not showing when searching for a GC code as well as dropped pins sometimes not showing. Sorry about those bugs, sometimes they slip through. :( We also had to revert a fix for cache radius circles disappearing at high zoom levels. This will be fixed again in a future update. Thanks for using Cachly! Cachly 7.0.7 December 21, 2021 With this version we bring you mostly bug fixes! Features Trackable Inventory: When adding TB to cache log it should show tracking code in subtitle text Bug Fixes Settings: Dark mode option sometimes does not allow changing Draft Log: Spoken text creates strange unicode character Loading caches sometimes takes two taps to load them Import GPX causing duplicate logs in certain situations Premium Offline Maps: Cache Radius Circles get Removed When Switching to Other App Then Returning Cache radius circles disappear at high zoom levels if panning away from cache pin GPX Export: & should be replaced with & for all XML data iOS 15: Tab bar text is sometimes truncated with ... Cachly 7.0.6 October 31, 2021 Features Live Search Filtering for Adventure Labs now uses the API to exclude owned and completed Adventure Labs now show completed or owned icons Tap Cache Type Icon in Cache Details to show user's own logs Background Image URL now listed in Additional Information Apple Standard Muted added to map layers Log Message: Included option to clear log message in ... menu Added support for additional Apple Watch complications Watch App: Update home screen to use list view design to better fit text TB Scanner: Save zoom level and use that default next time scanner is used Option to skip login when needed Fixes Freezing issue with Premium Offline Maps and cache radius circles should now be fixed Exporting a GPX with & in the title would cause GPX issues Logged in user sometimes wouldn't correctly show user type 2x tile size working again in iOS 15 Importing GPX from Files app is now more reliable Personal Notes: Better support for notes saved with poor or no connection Premium Offline Maps: Navigate to cache red line should not flash when updating location Import GPX should no longer duplicate logs in certain situations Logs of small boring fixes Cachly 7.0.5 September 17, 2021 In this release Premium Offline Maps: Smoother animation when following current location. Premium Offline Maps: Bug fix for current location indicator sometimes not showing. General Bug Fixes If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 7.0.4 September 10, 2021 In this release Fix for navigating to cache with Google Maps for cache with & in the title General Bug Fixes If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 7.0.3 August 24, 2021 In this release Offline Lists: Updating/Removing corrected coordinates should save immediately and not wait to check for network connection Remove requirement for iCloud for highlights, auto-visit and live templates but use when available Fixed bug that was causing Premium Offline Maps to freeze. If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 7.0.2 August 12, 2021 In this release Trackable Auto-visit: Remove trackable from auto-visit list if user dropped trackable into a cache Trackable Inventory: Loading more than 50 trackables is now possible If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 7.0.1 August 10, 2021 In this release Trackable Auto-visit: Only Found It, Attended and Webcam Photo Taken should allow auto-visit. Cache Description: Dark Mode is no longer used in web view to allow cache owner's original text/html. Logs: Show favorite heart on all logs including own logs. Logs Tab: Show cache type icon instead of user avatar. Trackables: Backdating cache should also update trackable date. Various other bug fixes. If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 7.0 July 23, 2021 Cachly 7.0 is our biggest update yet! It brings some great new features including Dark Mode, Live Search Templates and much more. If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store, it really helps. Dark Mode with Dark Maps Live Search Filtering Templates Options to turn off dark mode within Cachly Show all waypoints of all caches Geocaching HQ solution checker Trackables auto-visit list Apple Watch enhancements: Personal Note, offline lists, logs, photos, attributes, waypoints Brand new in-app help with search able topics and a help website with same content Navigate to cache: auto-zoom as you get closer to ground zero Save Adventure Labs to Offline Lists Import GPX: option to upload corrected coordinates and personal notes to geocaching.com Import GPX from Waymarkly Much much more If you have questions or comments please email support@cach.ly, we are happy to help! Cachly 6.2.2 June 7, 2021 Your favorite feature is included in this release. Bug fixes! Cachly 5.0.4 March 7, 2019 Additional bug fixes Cachly 5.0.3 March 1, 2019 If you are loving Cachly please make sure to leave a review in the App Store! New Catalan translation Settings option to disable map tilt Drafts can now upload multiple images Fixed: Logging a Webcam cache "Webcam Photo Taken" giving API error Fixed: Log Type Default: Found It default should also set Webcam and Events correctly Fixed: Live filtering and usernames with special characters Fixed: Live filtering sometimes not showing all cache sizes Fixed: Trackable log images not being created Fixed: Trackable images not uploading Fixed: Pending bulk log upload not sending images Fixed: Drafts not sending images Fixed: Drafts not sending trackable logs Fixed: Navigate to cache button should be larger and easier to tap Additional bug fixes Cachly 5.0.2 February 27, 2019 If you are loving Cachly 5 please make sure to leave a review in the App Store! Drafts can now be sent without log text Battery saving enhancements, turning off GPS when not needed Option to Tip the Developer on the More tab Contour heights are shown more often Navigate to cache should keep the screen turned on FTF and date bug has been fixed Searching for coordinates should not do an automatic search for caches after dropping pin Acknowledge and thank beta testers in About Cachly Offline Maps: Update motorway styles in the UK to be blue and stand out more Offline Maps: Fix for layer options not always updating map Offline List Filtering: Fixed issue with favorites compound filtering Cachly 5.0.1 February 24, 2019 Small bug fixes! Cachly 5.0 October 4, 2018 Cachly 5.0 is finally here! Over 8 months of work have gone into this major update that includes brand new offline maps, exciting new features and a refreshed design. Brand new Offline Maps with beautiful new styles, contours, and hillshades Google Maps Google Street View Log upvoting Lonely caches Highlight colors with iCloud sync Sorting and filtering highlight colors View multiple offline lists at the same time View all offline caches in database Live search can load full caches Log dots shown in list and map callout views Coordinate detection allows tapping for quick actions Apple Flyover Maps Offline list search Turn off live filtering but keep settings History syncs across devices Event caches happening in 24 show special icon Offline Filtering: date published, hidden year, hidden month, multiple string search, lonely Visual distinction between Disabled and Archived caches Premium Offline Map layer customization Live filtering: show caches with or without notes Logs now support markdown Navigating to cache shows other caches in area Pending log can be viewed from cache details Easier to add corrected coordinates Logs: Search field to filter on search terms Personal logs show log time Custom map tile URLs Ordnance Survey maps using custom tile URL Add cache to watch or ignore list Logs: Edit log date and time Earthcache and Virtuals tapping give option to send answers Printing cache description includes cache info View your unpublished caches Message Center for Premium users Much more! If you love Cachly please make sure to leave us a review on the App Store! Questions and comments can be sent using the support options in the More tab. Cachly 4.3.7 August 31, 2018 Due to recent privacy updates and GDPR regulations some user profile features had to be removed. Current users can still view all previous user profile data. We also fixed some bugs with importing GPX files. Cachly 4.3.6 August 9, 2018 Due to recent privacy updates and GDPR regulations we have had to remove the friends feature from Cachly. We are very sorry about these changes. Friends have been removed from the More tab Adding Friends has been removed from user profiles Searching by username is still supported in the More tab. Cachly 4.3.5 August 2, 2018 Fixed a crashing issue with friends. Cachly 4.3.4 August 1, 2018 Updates to Cachly friends functionality which now allows for integration of Geocaching friends. Cachly 4.3.3 June 18, 2018 Fix for pairing Apple Watch with iOS device Bug fixes Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 4.3.2 June 14, 2018 Apple Watch Cachly Complication for quick access Fix for pairing Apple Watch with iOS device Bug fixes Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 4.3.1 June 13, 2018 Small fix to make Metaverse links work correctly. Cachly 4.3 June 1, 2018 Cachly 4.3 is here! With this release comes some amazing new features including support for Apple Watch. Here is the full list: Apple Watch App Load caches button has been moved to bottom of map Filter Live caches moved to filter button Save multiple caches at a time to online Lists Offline and Online Lists are now under the Lists tab Online List enhancements: Create List, Delete List, Edit List, Remove caches from List Offline List enhancements: Delete visible, add/remove highlight from visible, save to other list Save online lists Save user finds, user hides and caches near this to lists Saving Pocket Queries and Live full caches download much faster New log keywords: Country, State, Cache Type, Cache Size and Day of week View which offline lists a cache is part of Pending Logs txt file is saved in Documents as a backup Privacy updates Bug fixes Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 4.2.1 March 25, 2018 Bug fixes Cachly 4.2 March 15, 2018 Cachly 4.2 is here! With this release comes some amazing new features including the ability to edit logs. Log Enhancements Edit Logs Delete Logs Add Photos to Created Logs Additional legacy cache types added to filters Bug fixes Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 4.1 February 15, 2018 Cachly 4.1 is here! Scan Trackables that have QR codes Trackable Pending Logs has new updated design Trackable Pending Logs now has bulk upload Pending Logs bulk uploading now allows selecting which logs to upload Sync highlighting across devices and Live/Offline Major performance improvements when update offline caches Option to lock your device orientation in Cachly Bug fixes! Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 4.0.1 February 8, 2018 Dutch translation fixes Cachly 4.0 November 22, 2017 Cachly 4.0 is here! With this release comes some amazing new features: Official iPad support Landscape support Filter Templates that can be reused Create and edit offline caches Phone or text a friend if you have that username in your iOS contacts Trackables now have sorting options New cache type icons! Offline List sorting options History items show cache type Offline cache images now download in the background and are shown on the new Downloads screen Log text is now selectable Navigate to Cache screen shows cache name Higher contrast and larger fonts Live list view now has a refresh button to load more caches Tap current location when navigating to a cache allows that to be created as a waypoint Search options now show what is available for Regular users Sorting option: Highlighted Offline List Filters now have the option to invert/reverse the filter Offline List Filters now allow regex Offline List Filters for attributes now has a "does not have" option New Filter type: Has Logs New Filter type: Has Attributes Bookmarks are now called Lists Cache waypoints have more descriptive map icons Option to highlight all caches in an offline list Higher resolution attribute icons We have also made sure to fix a lot of bugs along the way. Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 3.1 October 23, 2017 Cachly 3.1 is finally here! With this release comes some amazing new features: Multiple log text templates User logs can be filtered by different log types Filtering options for Found Date, Downloaded Date, Last Update Date and Last Found Date, Placed Date, Favorited and Distance Filtering logic for AND/OR Login can now use your iOS keychain usernames and passwords Find caches near this cache option Description and Hint uses fonts based on iOS text accessibility Option to delete a cache from all offline lists Option to backup all offline lists in the new Backups section Download all available images for a cache Delete offline images for a single cache Search for caches within map bounds Offline images are saved in a single location to prevent duplicate downloads Deleting offline list performance greatly increased Pending Logs bulk upload will flag logs with errors Related webpage option is now available on caches that have this Force touch or long press on list view or map callout to show options including Show cache on map option Images in the cache description will now be download offline GPX exports and imports include FTF attribute Offline lists have the option to update only visible caches Updates for the iPhone X We have also fixed over 200 bugs. Questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 3.0.3 July 14, 2017 Cachly 3.0.3 includes the following: Features FTF indicator! Shows caches that have not been found and are available for an FTF. - Premium feature New Found and DNF icons Owned Events can now post an Announcement log Export GPX options: include GSAK extensions, not include logs, hide personal info Trackable details refresh by pulling down on screen Trackables now show distance Smily and DNF icons also show corrected coordinate indicator New higher resolution log type icons Adding event to your calendar also includes coord.info URL Offline lists now have Export option under their options menu Lab cache GPX files are now supported! Pending Logs show more info, including if it is a Draft or is favorited Exported GPX includes GSAK corrected coordinate data Dropped pin now includes a "Navigate to" option Settings option to show current location indicator in front of cache pins Bug fixes Bulk log upload was giving trackables incorrect date Importing GPX with images was not saving images or completing import Couldn't export and email GPX if name has accents Corrected coordinate indicator now shows on corner of map pin Coordinate project field needs to allow more characters for decimal places Activity indicator was not being hid sometimes when loading offline list Pocket Query downloads now keeps screen from locking Trackables not being sent in bulk upload if log was a Draft Refresh search icon sometimes dissapeared GPX imports had incorrect log sort order (requires re-import). Not Authorized error is friendlier with the option to wait to logout Offline list waypoints need to be sorted in ABC order Bulk log upload was not sending updated coordinates Export GPX incorrectly includes original coordinate waypoint Offline list with clustering now correctly centers on clusters and caches when loading map Export GPX sometimes had invalid unicode characters Highlight gets removed from offline cache when adding same cache again Navigate to Cache screen wasn't letting you tap the cache pin to show options Waypoints sometimes don't show coordinates on Waypoints list screen If you have any questions or comments please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 3.0.2 July 7, 2017 We are always trying to make Cachly better and better. If you have any questions or concerns please contact support@cach.ly. Feel free to leave us a review on the App Store if you love Cachly! In this release Log dates were showing incorrectly New Offline Lists sometimes don't show caches right away Bulk log upload shouldn't allow screen to lock Bulk log upload shouldn't require drafts to have message Removed blank line above log template text Elevation needs to be shown in smaller units Attach log image has new icon Has Cache Note filter sometimes wasn't working correctly Found filter needs to take into account found but not logged .txt file not incrementing finds keyword Attributes should be sorted PQ cache attributes sometimes had incorrect state Translation fixes Cachly 3.0.1 June 29, 2017 Fixed a performance issue when users had a large amount of offline caches. Please contact support@cach.ly with any questions! Cachly 3.0 January 23, 2017 Cachly 3.0 is finally here! We are bringing you some very powerful new features as well as some amazing performance enhancements to make offline caching even better. This release has the following: Offline List Performance Upgrades: allow for massive lists to be saved (tested over 50k caches) and very fast loading. Offline List Clustering: This speeds up loading of very large offline lists, but can be turned off and all options changed. Offline List Filtering: Powerful filtering with the following filter options, Archived, Attributes, Available, Cache Note, Cache Type, Owned, Container Size, Country, DNF, Description, Difficulty, Favorites, Found, GC Code, Has Cache Note, Has Corrected Coordinates, Has Photos, Has Trackables, Has Waypoints, Highlighted, Hint, Is Premium, Log Text, Name, Owner, Placed By, State and Terrain. Bulk Pending Log Upload! New Coordinate Parser allows searching of any coordinate format Current location heading indicator Search Options: Search by State or Country Coordinate Projection for Waypoints Direct text input of coordinates to create waypoints Usage screen show detailed Cachly disk usage Option to not automatically search for caches on start Option to download offline images for a cache coord.info URLs can be entered into search Recent logs can use smiley or DNF icons UTM Coordinates shown in Additional Information Upside down portrait mode Option to clear all found checkmarks Export GPX enhancements Updated GPX error messages Field Notes are now Drafts 3.0 includes many other enhancements and fixes we couldn't list them all! If you have questions please contact support@cach.ly. As always, if you love Cachly please consider leaving us a review. Cachly 2.0 September 6, 2016 Version 2.0 is finally here! This release is jam packed with brand new features and updates that will take your Geocaching experience to a whole other level. Vector maps use Open Street Maps. Souvenirs! Updated User Profile now shows Finds, Hides, Logs, Souvenirs, User Gallery and much more. Updated map callout, list view and cache details screen with more information such as favorites and trackables. Personal Cache notes are much more visible View users who favorited a cache Pocket Queries download even more cache data including corrected coordinates and cache notes Refresh caches in an Offline List Merge Offline Lists Copy Offline Lists Rename Offline Lists Reorder Offline Lists Distance scale on map Option to keep caches on the map when loading more caches Highlight caches Highlight imported caches from GSAK if user flag is set Descriptions can show HTML version Export Pending logs as a .txt file Option to turn on compass calibration Option to Delete All Pending Logs Option to download Lite or Full caches for Offline use Trackable search by TB code and Tracking code Number of Pending Logs shows up on app icon For support please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 1.0.7 March 23, 2016 If you love Cachly please consider leaving a review or updating your review on the App Store. It really helps us out! In this release we have included the following: Fixes a bug that caused freezing during navigation Download just visible caches to offline list Personal Notes can be created offline Waypoints can be created offline French language support Polish language support New navigate button to zoom to target Addition support for GPX importing from Geocaching Australia and the Open Caching network Delete cache from offline list Option to hide log photos Update coordinates now show in logs Option to show radius around caches Tap location to copy current location to clipboard Login with Facebook Additional bug fixes and enhancements For support please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 1.0.6 March 9, 2016 If you love Cachly please consider leaving a review or updating your review on the App Store. It really helps us out! In this release we have included the following: Fixes to compass freezing and location tracking stopping while navigating to cache. Added ArcGIS Topo as a new map layer Corrected Coordinate search filters Additional bug fixes and enhancements For support please contact support@cach.ly. Cachly 1.0.5 March 4, 2016 Important bug fixes. Cachly 1.0.4 January 27, 2016 If you love using Cachly please consider leaving us a review on the App Store. It really helps us! This newest version of Cachly brings the following features: Brand new compass Corrected Coordinates support Drop all Trackables option Support for Markdown in logs Updated Handoff support Offline List enhancements Better handling of large GPX files Enhanced location tracking on Navigate screen Events show event date Add event to calendar Coordinates shown on Cache details screen Duplicate cache waypoint Google Maps Many additional bug fixes and small enhancements. For support please contact support@cach.ly Cachly 1.0.3 January 20, 2016 Bug fixes If you like Cachly please leave us a review on the App Store! It really helps. Cachly 1.0.2 December 16, 2015 ** Fixes an issue where Regular users get an error saying "Cache Download Limit Has Been Exceeded" ** Thanks for using Cachly! We have gotten such a great response so far, and have already taken user feedback to heart and included some new features into this version: Translate description, hint and logs to and from any language. Italian language localization Import GPX and zip files from iTunes Additional navigation options added including Navigon, Tom Tom, Waze, Gaia GPS and Pocket Earth Import from Dropbox supports zip files Waypoints created within a Pocket Query are now saved within the PQ as well as on the server Personal Notes created within a Pocket Query are now saved within the PQ as well as on the server Option to auto-decode hint Revamped Pocket Queries section Imported GPX files can now be saved as offline lists Search Filter: Non-Premium Only Additional bug fixes and enhancements. If you love using Cachly, please consider leaving us a review on the App Store. It really does help. Questions or comments, please email support@cach.ly Cachly 1.0.1 December 13, 2015 Fixed a few issues to make Cachly even better! Crash when going to a Trackable. A few other random crashes If you have been enjoying Cachly, please let us know and leave us a review in the app store, it really does help.
